title: Everbuild Multi-Purpose Wood Filler, Dark Oak, 250 ml & Multi-Purpose Wood Filler, Medium Stainable, 250 ml
features: Product 1: Ready mixed and easy to apply leaving a sandable surface that can be stained, painted or varnished if required
Product 1: Once dry the filler is waterproof making it suitable for both internal and external use
Product 1: This filler is non-flammable and has a low odour
Product 1: Available in light stainable, medium stainable, pine, white, light oak, dark oak, mahogany and teak
Product 2: Ready mixed and easy to apply leaving a sandable surface that can be stained, painted or varnished if required
Product 2: Once dry the filler is waterproof making it suitable for both internal and external use
Product 2: This filler is non-flammable and has a low odour
Product 2: Available in light stainable, medium stainable, pine, white, light oak, dark oak, mahogany and teak
description: From the manufacturer Before applying, ensure surfaces are clean, dry, sound and free from dust or any contaminants which may affect adhesion. Stir well before use and apply with a spreader or knife. Fill the hole proud to allow for sanding. Once dry, sand to a smooth finish and apply required stain.
